/*: Don't modify slug - If required, do it using cli edit command
name: Wayl Payments
description: Accept payments from Iraqi customers via ZainCash, FastPay, and other local Iraqi payment methods. Enable Pay to Book on your events — customers pay before their booking is confirmed. All amounts are in Iraqi Dinar (IQD).
/*isOAuth*/: true forces the install wizard to show the ACCOUNTS_STEP, which calls GET /api/integrations/waylpayment/add and redirects to the API-key setup page. Without it, handleAutoInstall silently creates an empty credential and skips setup. Cal.com has no separate 'requiresSetup' flag for non-OAuth credential collection.
